data.title: Ready to Start Crypto Investing? Get Up To $500 in Bonus Crypto With eToro
data.description:
Getting started in crypto and investing usually means putting your own money on the line first. 

eToro is changing that approach.

For a limited time, new users can earn up to $500 in crypto when they open an account and make their first deposit. Instead of requiring large balances or complicated trading activity, eToro is rewarding new investors with digital assets added directly to their portfolio.

In a market where many platforms feel intimidating for beginners, the offer lowers the barrier to getting started, with a real bonus attached.

Why This Offer Matters Right Now

More people are looking for simple ways to begin investing in crypto without jumping in blind.

eToro's platform is built for that kind of entry point. Users can access major cryptocurrencies, stocks, and ETFs in one place, manage everything through a single dashboard, and start with relatively small deposits.

Rather than waiting months to build momentum, new users can begin with extra capital already working for them. The crypto bonus gives first-time investors a cushion as they learn how the market works.

For many beginners, that early boost makes the difference between watching from the sidelines and actually participating.

What You Get With eToro

With an eToro account, users can:

  • Buy and sell cryptocurrencies, stocks, and ETFs in one platform
  • Access fractional investing for select assets
  • Track portfolios and performance in real time
  • Use social and copy trading tools to follow experienced investors
  • Manage everything through desktop or mobile apps

There are no required minimum balances to maintain, and users are free to build their portfolios at their own pace.

How the Crypto Bonus Works

The promotion rewards new users based on the size of their first deposit.

After registering, verifying your account, and making your first deposit, your selected cryptocurrency is added to your portfolio within about seven business days.

Here is how the bonus tiers work:

  • Deposit $200 to $499 → Receive $10 in crypto
  • Deposit $500 to $2,499 → Receive $30 in crypto
  • Deposit $2,500 to $4,999 → Receive $200 in crypto
  • Deposit $5,000 or more → Receive $500 in crypto

Only your first deposit counts toward the reward, so choosing the right amount upfront matters.

Eligible users select their preferred cryptocurrency during registration or through a follow-up form sent by email.

Who Is Eligible

The bonus is available to new users who have never made a deposit on eToro before and who live in eligible U.S. states. Residents of New York, Nevada, and Hawaii are currently excluded from the promotion.

Built for New and Growing Investors

eToro positions itself as a platform that grows with you.

Whether you are buying your first crypto asset or expanding into multiple markets, the tools are designed to remain usable as your portfolio becomes more complex. Instead of forcing investors into rigid products, eToro allows users to move between crypto, equities, and ETFs as their strategy evolves.

That flexibility is especially valuable for people who want to experiment, learn, and adjust without switching platforms.

For many first-time investors, the hardest step is opening the account and making that first deposit.

eToro's crypto bonus removes some of that friction by offering real value at the beginning, not after months of activity.

If you have been thinking about entering crypto or building a diversified investment portfolio in 2026, earning up to $500 in bonus crypto can make that first move easier.

With one account, multiple asset classes, and an upfront incentive, eToro gives new investors a practical way to get started and stay engaged.

Image: Shutterstock

data.title: A Glimpse Into The Expert Outlook On Rollins Through 5 Analysts
data.description:
In the latest quarter, 5 analysts provided ratings for Rollins (NYSE:ROL), showcasing a mix of bullish and bearish perspectives.

The following table encapsulates their recent ratings, offering a glimpse into the evolving sentiments over the past 30 days and comparing them to the preceding months.

Insights from analysts' 12-month price targets are revealed, presenting an average target of $66.6, a high estimate of $72.00, and a low estimate of $56.00. This upward trend is apparent, with the current average reflecting a 6.73% increase from the previous average price target of $62.40.

Exploring Analyst Ratings: An In-Depth Overview

In examining recent analyst actions, we gain insights into how financial experts perceive Rollins. The following summary outlines key analysts, their recent evaluations, and adjustments to ratings and price targets.

Key Insights:

Navigating through these analyst evaluations alongside other financial indicators can contribute to a holistic understanding of Rollins's market standing. Stay informed and make data-driven decisions with our Ratings Table.

Stay up to date on Rollins analyst ratings.

Discovering Rollins: A Closer Look

Rollins: A Financial Overview

Market Capitalization Analysis: Above industry benchmarks, the company's market capitalization emphasizes a noteworthy size, indicative of a strong market presence.

Revenue Growth: Rollins's remarkable performance in 3M is evident. As of 30 September, 2025, the company achieved an impressive revenue growth rate of 11.99%. This signifies a substantial increase in the company's top-line earnings. When compared to others in the Industrials sector, the company faces challenges, achieving a growth rate lower than the average among peers.

Net Margin: Rollins's financial strength is reflected in its exceptional net margin, which exceeds industry averages. With a remarkable net margin of 15.94%, the company showcases strong profitability and effective cost management.

Return on Equity (ROE): Rollins's ROE stands out, surpassing industry averages. With an impressive ROE of 10.99%, the company demonstrates effective use of equity capital and strong financial performance.

Return on Assets (ROA): The company's ROA is a standout performer, exceeding industry averages. With an impressive ROA of 5.11%, the company showcases effective utilization of assets.

Debt Management: Rollins's debt-to-equity ratio is below the industry average at 0.6, reflecting a lower dependency on debt financing and a more conservative financial approach.

The Significance of Analyst Ratings Explained

Experts in banking and financial systems, analysts specialize in reporting for specific stocks or defined sectors. Their comprehensive research involves attending company conference calls and meetings, analyzing financial statements, and engaging with insiders to generate what are known as analyst ratings for stocks. Typically, analysts assess and rate each stock once per quarter.

Some analysts publish their predictions for metrics such as growth estimates, earnings, and revenue to provide additional guidance with their ratings. When using analyst ratings, it is important to keep in mind that stock and sector analysts are also human and are only offering their opinions to investors.

This article was generated by Benzinga's automated content engine and reviewed by an editor.

data.title: Paycom Software Analysts Lower Their Forecasts After Q4 Results
data.description:
Paycom Software Inc (NYSE:PAYC) reported upbeat earnings for the fourth quarter on Wednesday.

The company posted quarterly earnings of $2.45 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $2.44 per share. The company reported quarterly sales of $544.300 million which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $543.009 million.

Paycom Software said it sees FY2026 sales of $2.175 billion to $2.195 billion, versus market estimates of $2.228 billion.

Paycom shares fell 11.4% to $105.09 in pre-market trading.

These analysts made changes to their price targets on Paycom following earnings announcement.

  • BTIG analyst Allan Verkhovski maintained Paycom Software with a Buy and lowered the price target from $195 to $140.
  • Mizuho analyst Siti Panigrahi maintained the stock with a Neutral and lowered the price target from $180 to $120.
